identity.name: GharSetu
identity.tagline: Connecting You to Your Perfect Space

visual_enhancers.texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

grids.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-md transition-all active:scale-95 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95 rounded-full px-6 py-4
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all rounded-full px-6 py-4

cards.property: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-stone-100 shadow-card hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300
cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-xl border border-stone-100 hover:border-secondary/30 hover:bg-secondary/5 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block text-stone-700

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic AI emojis (🤖, 🚀, 💡) in UI.
Do NOT use gradients for text.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute.
Use `framer-motion` for page transitions and micro-interactions.
Mobile-first: Always verify layouts on mobile viewports (grid-cols-1).
Use generous padding (py-24+) for sections to create breathing room.
Text readability is paramount: Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA) for all text.
For dates, use `date-fns` and Shadcn Calendar.
Avoid centering text in large blocks; left-align for readability.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections.
